Celebrate With Us
Our Story

A Love Written
in Golden Light

It started at a gallery opening in Maboneng. Marieka was captivated by the art, Michael was captivated by Marieka.

A coffee turned into brunch, turned into an all-day adventure. Two years of rooftop sunsets, road trips to the Drakensberg, and midnight conversations later, Michael proposed under the stars overlooking the Joburg skyline.

5 June 2027

The Celebration

An evening of love, laughter, and dancing under the Johannesburg sky
